Class ConcreteExecutionContext

java.lang.Object
dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
public final class ConcreteExecutionContext extends Object implements dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
Default implementation of IExecutionContext used by the runtime system of the Registermaschine.

This class maintains a complete mutable execution state of the virtual machine including:

  • Register values
  • The programme counter
  • Status flags (negative, zero, overflow, running)
  • Exit code
  • Input/output handling

The context also tracks dirty state for registers, flags, programme counter and output values. This allows external systems such as user interfaces to obtain incremental state updates using snapshotAndClearDirty() instead of re-reading the entire machine state.

Input operations are handled through a BlockingQueue so that execution can safely block while waiting for user input. When input is requested, registered IExecutionContextListeners are notified.

This implementation is designed to be used together with Executor, which drives the instruction execution loop.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ

  • Constructor Details

    • ConcreteExecutionContext

      public ConcreteExecutionContext()
      Creates a new execution context with a register array sized according to CoreConfig.REGISTERS.

      All registers, flags, and counters are initialised to zero.

  • Method Details

    • getRegister

      public int getRegister(int index)
      Returns the value stored in the specified register.
      Specified by:
      getRegister in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Parameters:
      index - the register index
      Returns:
      the current value of the register

    • setRegister

      public void setRegister(int index, int value)
      Updates the value of a register.

      The register is marked as dirty and all registered IExecutionContextListeners are notified.

      Specified by:
      setRegister in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Parameters:
      index - the register index
      value - the value to store in the register

    • getProgrammeCounter

      public int getProgrammeCounter()
      Returns the current programme counter.
      Specified by:
      getProgrammeCounter in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Returns:
      the index of the next instruction to execute

    • resetProgrammeCounter

      public void resetProgrammeCounter()
      Resets the programme counter to 0

      The programme counter is marked as dirty.

      Specified by:
      resetProgrammeCounter in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext

    • step

      public void step()
      Advances the programme counter by one instruction.

      This method is typically invoked by the executor before executing the current instruction.

      Specified by:
      step in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext

    • setProgrammeCounter

      public void setProgrammeCounter(int pc)
      Sets the programme counter to a new value.

      This operation counts as a jump. If the number of jumps exceeds maxJumpCounter(), execution is stopped and listeners are notified via IExecutionContextListener.onMaxJumpsReached().

      Specified by:
      setProgrammeCounter in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Parameters:
      pc - the new programme counter value

    • startExecution

      public void startExecution()
      Marks the execution context as running and notifies listeners that execution has started.
      Specified by:
      startExecution in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext

    • stopExecution

      public void stopExecution()
      Stops execution and notifies all listeners.
      Specified by:
      stopExecution in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext

    • isHalted

      public boolean isHalted()
      Returns whether the machine is currently halted.
      Specified by:
      isHalted in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Returns:
      true if execution is not running.

    • getNegativeFlag

      public boolean getNegativeFlag()
      Specified by:
      getNegativeFlag in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext

    • getZeroFlag

      public boolean getZeroFlag()
      Specified by:
      getZeroFlag in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext

    • getOverflowFlag

      public boolean getOverflowFlag()
      Specified by:
      getOverflowFlag in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext

    • getExitCode

      public byte getExitCode()
      Specified by:
      getExitCode in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext

    • setFlags

      public void setFlags(boolean negative, boolean zero, boolean overflow)
      Updates the machine status flags.

      The running flag is preserved while the arithmetic flags (negative, zero, overflow) are updated

      Specified by:
      setFlags in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Parameters:
      negative - whether the negative flag should be set
      zero - whether the zero flag should be set
      overflow - whether the overflow flag should be set

    • setExitCode

      public void setExitCode(byte code)
      Sets the exit code of the program and notifies listeners.
      Specified by:
      setExitCode in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Parameters:
      code - the exit code

    • incJumpCounter

      public void incJumpCounter()
      Specified by:
      incJumpCounter in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext

    • maxJumpCounter

      public int maxJumpCounter()
      Specified by:
      maxJumpCounter in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext

    • output

      public void output(int value)
      Emits an output value from the program.

      The value is stored for the next snapshot and listeners are notified immediately.

      Specified by:
      output in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Parameters:
      value - the value to output

    • input

      public int input()
      Requests an input value for the executing program.

      Listeners are notified that input is required. The execution thread blocks until a value is supplied via provideInput(int).

      Specified by:
      input in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Returns:
      the provided input value

    • provideInput

      public void provideInput(int value)
      Supplies an input value to the execution context.

      If a thread is currently waiting in input(), it will be unblocked and receive this value.

      Specified by:
      provideInput in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Parameters:
      value - the input value

    • setInputRequestCallback

      public void setInputRequestCallback(Runnable callback)
      Sets a callback that will be executed whenever input is requested.

      This can be used by user interfaces to trigger input prompts.

      Parameters:
      callback - the callback to execute when input is requested

    • snapshotAndClearDirty

      public dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.ExecutionSnapshot snapshotAndClearDirty()
      Creates an ExecutionSnapshot containing the current execution state and all registers that have changed since previous snapshot.

      After the snapshot is created, all dirty markers are cleared.

      Specified by:
      snapshotAndClearDirty in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
      Returns:
      a snapshot representing the latest observable execution state.
